history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 2, column B, facing east (right). The next cell in front is (2,C) which is floor. To progress towards the goal, I need to move right along row2 until I reach column G, then go down. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row2, column C, facing east. The goal is at row8, column H. The only safe path down from row2 is at column G, because row3 column G is floor while other columns below have lava. I need to continue moving east to reach column G. The next cell forward is (2,D) which is floor.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row2, column D, facing east. The goal is at row8, column H. I need to reach column G to go down. Next cell (2,E) is floor, so I continue moving east.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row2, column E, facing east. The path continues east to column F, which is floor. I need to reach column G to go down.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row2, column F, facing east. The next cell east (col G) is floor, and it leads to a path that can go south later. I will move forward to reach column G.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row2 colG facing east. I need to go south to reach the goal at row8 colH. The cell directly south (row3 colG) is floor, so I should turn to face south first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,G) facing down. The cell directly south (3,G) is floor, so I can move forward to start my descent. I plan to go down to (6,G), then east to (6,H), then down to the goal at (8,H).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,G) facing down. The cell directly south (4,G) is floor. I will continue moving south to follow my planned path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (4,G) facing down. The cell directly south (5,G) is floor, so I can move forward towards (6,G).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (5,G) facing down. The cell directly south (6,G) is floor. I will move forward to (6,G) to continue towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,G) facing down. The cell directly south (7,G) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go east to (6,H) then south to (7,H) and then to (8,H) goal. To face east, I turn counter-clockwise from down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,G) facing right. The cell directly east (6,H) is floor, so I can move forward to get closer to the goal at (8,H).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,H) facing right. The cell to the east (6,I) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (8,H) to the south. I need to face down to move south. Turning clockwise from right gives me down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,H) facing down. The cell directly ahead (7,H) is floor, so I can move forward towards the goal at (8,H).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,H) facing down. The cell directly ahead is (8,H) which is the goal 'O'. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
